{{- define "main" }}
{{- $filter := "" }} {{- $path := "img/highlightjs-icon.png" }} {{- with resources.Get $path }} {{- with .Resize "48x" }} {{ $filter = images.Overlay . 0 80 }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Unable to resize overlay %q" $path }} {{end }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Unable to get overlay %q" $path }} {{- end }} {{- with resources.Get "img/huggingface-1254x1254.png" }} {{- with $image := .Resize "128x" }} {{ with $image.Filter $filter }} {{- else }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Unable to get home-image %q" $path }} {{- end }} {{- end }}

{{ site.Params.Description }}

{{- .Summary }} {{- .Store.Set "loadHighlightJS" true -}}
Hugo-Html 

{{- `{{ printf "discourse Hello %s -> %s" $World .}}
{{- /*  printf "ONE second line */ -}}


{{ range $k, $v := hugo.Generator $ $.Method -}}
{{ site.Language.Label }}
{{ hugo.Sites.Pages }}
` -}}
Discourse standard 

{{- `{{ printf "discourse Hello %s -> %s" $World .}}
{{- /*  printf "ONE second line */ -}}


{{ range $k, $v := hugo.Generator $ $.Method -}}
{{ site.Language.Label }}
{{ hugo.Sites.Pages }}
` -}}
{{- .ContentWithoutSummary }} {{- end }}
